description: CompositionBlack quilted jacket made of 100% polyester, has long sleeves with elasticated cuffs, mock neck, zippered closure on the front, red and grey panel detailing on the front and back, insert pockets on either sides of the zipper with zippered closures, light thermore filling for insulation and an elasticated hemlineFittingRegularWash careMachine wash cold with like coloursDo not bleachTumble dry on lowThis quilted jacket from nike based on skiing staples is perfect for chilly weather. The grey, black and red panels give an added edge, while the thermore filling offers lightweight comfort and superior warmth. Team this with tees and jeans.
